comments.body:
## Description

Remove dead _CREATE_CMD code from hook_commit_failure_tracker() in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/pre-bash-functions.sh.

## What to remove

From lines ~148-181 in hook_commit_failure_tracker():

1. Remove: local _CREATE_CMD_FROM_ENV="${CREATE_CMD:-}" (line ~149)
2. Remove: local _CREATE_CMD="${CREATE_CMD:-ticket create}" (line ~151)
3. Remove: the entire config-read block for _CREATE_CMD (lines ~173-181):
   if [[ -n "$_READ_CONFIG" ]] && [[ -z "$_CREATE_CMD_FROM_ENV" ]]; then
       local _CREATE
       if [[ -n "$_CT_CONFIG_FILE" ]]; then
           _CREATE=$("$_READ_CONFIG" issue_tracker.create_cmd "$_CT_CONFIG_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo '')
       else
           _CREATE=$("$_READ_CONFIG" issue_tracker.create_cmd 2>/dev/null || echo '')
       fi
       [[ -n "$_CREATE" ]] && _CREATE_CMD="$_CREATE"
   fi

KEEP: _SEARCH_CMD and _SEARCH_CMD_FROM_ENV (used at line ~255, ~275).
KEEP: The _READ_CONFIG variable setup and _SEARCH_CMD config read block (needed for search).
KEEP: _CT_CONFIG_FILE setup (still needed for search).

## Constraint
Do NOT remove the SEARCH_CMD config-read block — only the CREATE_CMD config-read block.

## TDD Requirement
Failing tests from task 5d27-a37d must be green after this change.

## Files to edit
- plugins/dso/hooks/lib/pre-bash-functions.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

- [ ] _CREATE_CMD and _CREATE_CMD_FROM_ENV variables no longer exist in pre-bash-functions.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q '_CREATE_CMD' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/lib/pre-bash-functions.sh

- [ ] issue_tracker.create_cmd config read block removed from hook_commit_failure_tracker
  Verify: ! grep -q 'issue_tracker.create_cmd' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/lib/pre-bash-functions.sh

- [ ] _SEARCH_CMD and its config read block still present (not accidentally removed)
  Verify: grep -q '_SEARCH_CMD' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/lib/pre-bash-functions.sh

- [ ] RED tests from task 5d27-a37d now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-commit-tracker.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'PASS'

- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: task complete, committed in batch 9
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
